# hidDescriptorType

**Instance Property**

The type of the descriptor.

## Declaration

```swift
uint8_t hidDescriptorType;
```

## Getting the Properties

- **hidDescriptorLengthHi**: The high byte length of the descriptor.
- **hidDescriptorLengthLo**: The low byte length of the descriptor.
